item.title: It’s happening again
item.description: https://twitter.com/chrisoconnoriv/status/1529233083291123714 Another school mass shooting, this time in Texas. 14 kids and their teacher, dead. And you Americans are not going to do anything about it. You’re going to sit on your asses and do nothing, or go out and vote for the scumbag cult that defends this while making money for gun manufacturers, like all the previous times it happened. You’re a fucking sick joke of a shit hole of a country.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: It is a choice.
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SyKazuhgxTA&ab_channel=CNN So much pointless death and avoidable suffering on this planet, I can't bear it. Please, don't let this continue. My sincerest condolences.
item.dc:creator: michaelpencil

item.title: My first cosplay vs my most recent!!
item.description: My first ever cosplay versus my most recent!! Go easy on little 14 year old M, they were absolutely going through it hehe.,, but I’m proud of my progress and can’t wait to grow more in my skills and happiness!! :3
